svg.title: DeepSeek API cache hit optimization
svg.desc: Before: alternating prompts cause cache misses. After: batching by prompt type enables prefix cache reuse, improving hit rate from 0.2% to 52%.
svg.text: After: batch by prompt type (52% cache hit)
Same _PROMPT_CORRECT prefix → KV cache reused across all requests
Cost per hit: $0.0028 / M tokens (1/50 of miss price)
Result: 0.2% → 52% cache hit rate, significant cost reduction
